heading: Authorization of appropriation for GATT revision
label: 2131 Authorization of appropriation for GATT revision
text: There are authorized to be appropriated annually such sums as may be necessary for the payment by the United States of its share of the expenses of the Contracting Parties to the General Agreement on Tariffs and Trade. This authorization does not imply approval or disapproval by the Congress of all articles of the General Agreement on Tariffs and Trade.
notes: Amendments1988— substituted “There are” for “(d) There are”.Pub. L. 100–647Subsecs. (a) to (c). struck out subsec. (a) which provided for bringing existing trade agreements into conformity with principles promoting open, nondiscriminatory, and fair world economic system, subsec. (b) which provided for agreements with foreign countries or instrumentalities, and subsec. (c) which provided for changes in Federal law through legislation implementing trade agreements.Pub. L. 100–4181979—Subsec. (c). substituted “Such trade agreement may be entered into under ” for “Such trade agreement may be submitted to the Congress for approval in accordance with the procedures of ”.Pub. L. 96–39section 2112 of this titlesection 2191 of this title
